tweets.text:
🚨 FRAUD UPDATE: Under the leadership of @VP and alongside @USLaborIG on the @WHFraudTF, we’re hunting down fraudsters and recovering taxpayer dollars.  

➡️ $135 BILLION in unemployment benefits was stolen through COVID-era fraud.  

➡️ @USDOL has frozen $520 MILLION tied to fraudulent activity.  

➡️ We’re now tracking down another $912 MILLION sitting on prepaid debit cards.  

LEARN MORE: https://t.co/RQUOeTg7Ni

tweets.text:
This week in Georgia, I had the opportunity to meet with workers from industries across the state. 

One thing was clear: American workers are energized by the work we’re doing at @USDOL under @POTUS to put them first, grow our economy, and help them keep more of their hard-earned paychecks!

tweets.text:
Thanks to @VP’s @WHFraudTF and @USLaborIG, @USDOL has uncovered shocking levels of fraud that went unchecked for FAR too long…

➡️ Nearly $29 billion went to the same Social Security numbers across multiple states
➡️ $139 million was paid to deceased individuals
➡️ More than BILLION sent to children under 14 claiming unemployment benefits

The days of fraudsters exploiting the American taxpayer are over. We are hunting down this fraud, holding bad actors accountable, and fighting to ensure Americans’ hard-earned tax dollars are protected!
tweets.text_resolved:

➡️ More than BILLION sent to children under 14 claiming unemployment benefits

The days of fraudsters exploiting the American taxpayer are over. We are hunting down this fraud, holding bad actors accountable, and fighting to ensure Americans’ hard-earned tax dollars are protected!

tweets.text:
Under @POTUS’ leadership, @USDOL recovered roughly $4.3 billion in unspent and unused COVID funds and returned it to the Treasury.

As I serve on the @VP’s Task Force to Eliminate Fraud, we will continue restoring integrity in the Unemployment Insurance system, prevent fraud before it happens, and hold criminals accountable.
tweets.text_resolved:
Under @POTUS’ leadership, @USDOL recovered roughly $4.3 billion in unspent and unused COVID funds and returned it to the Treasury.

As I serve on the @VP’s Task Force to Eliminate Fraud, we will continue restoring integrity in the Unemployment Insurance system, prevent fraud before it happens, and hold criminals accountable.

tweets.text:
I’ve spoken with the @SpiritAirlines CEO, union leaders of flight attendants and pilots, and @USDOT to coordinate support for impacted workers.  
 
The Department of Labor is taking ACTION to support affected workers and help them get back to work quickly.  From immediate unemployment support to job placement and retraining, here’s what @USDOL is doing for displaced workers now:  
 
𝗥𝗔𝗣𝗜𝗗 𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗣𝗢𝗡𝗦𝗘

We’re working to ensure fast processing, so Americans aren’t left waiting. The Department of Labor is deploying Rapid Response teams to affected hubs to help workers:  
- File Unemployment Insurance claims  
- Get eligibility guidance  
- Access benefits as quickly as possible  
 
𝗝𝗢𝗕 𝗣𝗟𝗔𝗖𝗘𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗧  

Our goal is to get workers back into good-paying jobs fast! We’re connecting Spirit employees directly to new opportunities by:  
- Coordinating with major airlines and aviation employers  
- Hosting targeted job fairs and recruitment events  
- Prioritizing placement through American Job Centers  
 
𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗜𝗡𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗔𝗡𝗗 𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗞𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗚

Workers shouldn’t have to start over. We’re activating workforce funding to support:  
- Short-term certifications in aviation, logistics, and high-demand fields  
- On-the-job training programs with employers  
- Career pathways that build on existing skills 
 
We’re also helping workers access health coverage resources, childcare and support services, and career counseling. Visit here to learn more: https://t.co/emnohU0ksG  
 
This is about getting Americans back on their feet quickly. @USDOL will use every tool available to connect impacted workers to jobs, training, and real opportunities.

tweets.text:
As a member of @VP's Task Force to Eliminate Fraud, @USDOL is doubling down on our efforts to eliminate the waste and abuse that has run rampant across our nation's federal programs for too long, including within UI programs. 

We have a responsibility to ensure the system *Americans* pay into is helping *Americans* get back on their feet, not helping fraudsters and other criminals take in cash on the taxpayer's dime.

tweets.text:
Thank you, Secretary Chavez-DeRemer, for your leadership. Under your reign, the Department of Labor reversed years of bad policy from the previous administration – cutting regulatory burdens, exposing fraud, boosting apprenticeships, and making life more affordable for hardworking Americans.

Thank you to President Trump for the opportunity to serve as Acting Secretary of Labor. We will keep up the fight to put American workers first.

Under @POTUS’ leadership, @USDOL is taking action to simplify compliance for American employers while strengthening protections to put American Workers First.

Our latest proposed rule lays out a clear joint employment standard that aims to give businesses confidence to invest in partnerships, help workers understand their rights, and make enforcement more efficient.
